name: wakewait
description: Native shell sleep and deterministic wait for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Native shell sleep and deterministic wait for Codex.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait is a skill-only Codex plugin. Fixed-duration sleep uses native shell commands directly, while bundled PowerShell and POSIX scripts handle wait-file, wait-contains, and wait-command without model polling or persistent state.
defaultPrompt: Use WakeWait for a 10-minute native shell sleep.
Wait for an output file with the bundled WakeWait shell script.
Install the WakeWait v2 skill and scripts.
